tasks.name: task-1-sgrid-api
tasks.summary: ScentGrid 인터페이스에 worldToCell/cellToWorld 추가, ScentGridImpl에 구현, 14개 테스트 추가, verify 통과

tasks.name: task-2-pursuer-fix
tasks.summary: Pursuer sentinel -1→null, cell calc switched to ScentGrid worldToCell/cellToWorld, DEFAULT_SCENT_CELL_SIZE removed, 81 tests pass, verify 통과

tasks.name: task-3-runtime-sampler-align
tasks.summary: PursuerState 타입 nullable 전환, runtime null 체크, scentSampler visited 필터 grid.worldToCell() 정렬, cellSize 파라미터 제거, npm run verify 통과

tasks.name: task-4-fix-cellkey
tasks.summary: rebuildGridCells cellKey를 ${entry.cx}, (ScentGrid col/row index)로 수정, centerX/centerZ 제거, verify 통과
